reviews.评论: If I could give zero stars I would have. I recently purchased the MK270 Logitech full size wireless combo keyboard and mouse. However upon inspecting the keyboard and mouse AND the box and bags everything came in, the wireless adapter was NOT included as it should have been.  Very disappointed.
I like the wireless, space bar has a squeak to it. Keys are not quite.

DOA 4 days after product return window closed. Worked perfectly till then, shut down computer at night, turned on computer in the morning wondering why Alt-P no longer worked. Swapped out keyboard/mouse/dongle and things worked fine. Batteries at 1.56V, caps lock light no longer lights up.
Looses link with pc very easily.  Other than that , nice keyboard

reviews.标题: Mouse scroll wheel will require therapy.
reviews.评论: Keyboard still seems fine, though in hindsight I wish I‘d purchased one with backlighting and a trackpad.The mouse scroll wheel however has become completely janky, scrolling the wheel no longer translates to the expected scrolling behavior, up sometimes goes down, or vice versa, or neither. It‘s annoying enough that I finally had to write this review to vent my dissatisfaction. Will not buy again. And honestly, I love Logitech products, long time customer, but this wheel can‘t be removed, blowing air doesn‘t help, it‘s maddening.

The mouse scroll weel stops responding making me turn the mouse off and back on again to get it to respond. Very annoying. My return window is closed so I am going to buy a new keyboard and mouse combo. This time I will choose a dell which I had before until my mouse stopped responding after several years.

I have always bought Logitech products because their customer service was great. However, this latest experience did not bear that out. The keyboard I bought would not work with their SetPoint software -- even to do something simple like program function keys. After one attempt to help, their “level two“ team sent me a detailed list of heavy duty instructions to follow on my own, including about two hours worth of things to try -- with no guarantee that any of it would work. I‘m going to have to junk this mouse and keyboard, and buy something from a more reliable brand.

reviews.标题: Keyboard is not low profile or quiet as claimed in the description
reviews.评论: The description says “low-profile, quiet keys“ for the keyboard. Nope. It‘s like one from the 80s: not low profile in the least, and definitely not quiet. Typing is clicky-clacky
The quality of the product deteriorated after a few months, and it ceased to function. We would not recommend its purchase.

reviews.标题: Keyboard/Mouse Have Gargage Ergonomics and Typing Delays and Mouse Skipping a Constant Issue
reviews.评论: Tons of delay typing on keyboard. Mouse skips all over the place. Mouse ergonomics are horrendous. Feels like absolute garbage in your hand. Honestly, the keyboard is uncomfortable as well. Easily the WORST keyboard/mouse combo I‘ve ever bought, and I‘ve been satisfied with cheaper ones. Returning this garbage.

reviews.标题: The mouse only lasted for just over 3 months
reviews.评论: I‘ve only had this keyboard/mouse for a little over 3 months and the mouse is already dead. I changed out the battery put it still keeps dying. This will be the last time I buy logitech products. Garbage.

I liked the product but I‘ve bought it twice and after 6 months the mouse starts having issues, left clicking once makes it click twice and it is can become very annoying. I was hoping after the first time that it was just a one-off, but It seems like product is not built for longevity, you get what you pay for I guess.
DID NOT COME WITH USB DRIVE- MISSING FROM INSIDE MOUSE. USELESS. Waited FOUR DAYS to get this and needed it NOW.
I would have given 0 star if I could. Worst keyboard ever. Didn’t even last 3 weeks and start bugging.
Rechargeable batteries don‘t last very long!!!  I like the keyboard layout but the rechargeable batteries have to be charged to often

reviews.标题: Poor! what a waste of my time!
reviews.评论: Is this product a scam? I ordered one, and it arrived missing the USB. I requested a replacement, and the new one came the exact same way—still missing the USB! How am I supposed to use it without the USB?
Only half the keys on the keyboard I received worked!  Had to return.
usb receiver was missing.  Got as a gift and 30 day window to return no longer option.

The mouse is perfect (5 stars) and the keyboard works mostly fine but the space key has an annoying “squeak“/whistle every time I press it. I‘d really like to not have to return it but this might drive me insane.

Some of the numbers stopped working on the key pad. the response time for many of the letters is terrible. unfortunately the window to return has closed. Buy from someone else. I think it may be refurbished

reviews.标题: Key press feel is very weird and un-click-certain
reviews.评论: This has to be the weirdest feel from a keyboard. It feels like typing keys on top of melted chocolate. If you like the definitive feeling for types, you won’t like this keyboard. It’s very un-certain keystroke feeling, and it’s annoying as all get out. I don’t want to return it, but I may have to.

reviews.标题: Be weary of receiving a returned and or defective product
reviews.评论: I wanted to love this and was so excited to get this for my wife for her new desk but unfortunately it did not even power on, mouse was missing and even when I just started pressing keys in hopes something would get it to power on I noticed the keys are all stuck when pressed down did not pop back up. I‘m sure it was a slight hiccup and I got a returned item but overall not the experience I was looking for and upset.
Mid ahh construction quality

This keyboard is a nice keyboard as others stated. I only have two major issues with it. (1) It is way smaller than expected. see my photo. It‘s more like a travel keyboard than one I‘d use for work.  They should clearly state that. I would not have gotten it in that case. (2) No On/Off button. I like being able to easily manually turn it off and on. Outside Because of that I think it‘s overpriced at $29.99. But ok I‘ll keep it for that rare occasion that I‘ll travel with my laptop. But as a daily keyboard for work in my case at least is a big no-go.
Keyboard is very cute and works well. But the scroll on the mouse is not working.

reviews.标题: Not for the quick Typers or phone note takers
reviews.评论: This keyboard kept freezing when I typed fast. It would turn the word into “h. Eeelllllo” type vibes. Lagged and froze when I typed fast. Do not recommend

reviews.标题: Good but COMPACT bluetooth keyboard and mouse set
reviews.评论: If you want a compact keyboard, then I‘d give it 5-stars.  However, this is NOT a full sized keyboard.  Also, the keys are the ‘chicklet‘ style with little tactile feedback.Ultimately, I am returning this as I need a full sized keyboard for my home office setup.

reviews.标题: What a piece of junk!. And that‘s the best part.
reviews.评论: THe instructions are inside the box the product comes in and appear to be written by a n-speaking individual. Did I say written? I men the stupid picture the individual made that are useless. I‘m sending min back before I take it outside and smash the live hell out of it with a sludge hammer. Don‘ bother buying this product. I‘d not worth the hassle. Logitech has gone so far down in my estimation, I will NEVER buy another Logitech product.

Do not buy this product. I exchanged my first set when the track wheel on the mouse stopped working on Day 5. Well, the track wheel on the replacement mouse just stopped working--10 days after the return window closed. There are also bluetooth latency issues with both the mouse and keyboard. I‘ve never had a problem with Logitech products before. Very disappointing. Total waste of money.

reviews.标题: Keyboard and mouse are small and uncomfortable for my hands
reviews.评论: This Logitech MK250 Bluetooth Wireless Mouse and Keyboard Combo comes with batteries. Just pull the tab to get started.The mouse and the keyboard easily connected to my desktop’s Bluetooth. The mouse is small and uncomfortable for me. The scroll wheel is stiff and noisy.The keyboard is small and some of the keys are in different places. It took me a while to find the Delete key. It’s below the numbers on the number pad. The keys are also noisy. At first I thought I would keep it for use with my desktop, despite the clicking noise of the keys. As I used it, my hands became sore because of the small size and not moving around as much as they are used to.

Would give it zero stars if possible. I just got this keyboard today, it connected quickly via Bluetooth to my PC and everything was absolutely great until I started typing. Some keys don‘t function, one being the letter “N“. Keyboard is useless.
Extremely hard to press. has absolutely no tactile feedback and requires much more force to press resulting in wrist pain

The scroll on the mouse stops working after 2 weeks. Ordered a replacement and the same issue occurred again. I really like the keyboard - the size fits perfectly in my bag. The keyboard and mouse are a little noisy, but it doesn‘t really bother me. It was ridiculously easy to set up too. The mouse wouldn‘t track well on some surfaces, but I have been able to manage. I also love that the keyboard has little feet that raise or lower it.

reviews.标题: Won‘t let me connect Bluetooth to PC
reviews.评论: I was really happy to get this in so I could use my PC across the room but unfortunately it doesn‘t connect to my desktops Bluetooth connection. It‘s a nice quality keyboard and it connected fine to my laptop I just wish it was compatible for what I wanted it for

reviews.标题: Well made, but the 20yo basic 3 button mouse makes this product a hard pass.
reviews.评论: Great keyboard and mouse right in line with Logitech‘s long history of well made products. They function well and are pretty straight forward in connection. The price is right and worth the expense. Both are solidly made and not too heavy, but also not flimsy, loose or cheaply constructed.There are a few things I don‘t like about them though. The first is, it does not contain a USB Bluetooth dongle, so if you don‘t have it built into whatever you are connecting it to, it won‘t work. I can‘t attest to it, but I do know if you are in a crowded building with a lot of Bluetooth devices, sporadic connection issues and drops can occur. I have had several BT/wireless devices and I always choose wireless with the dongle because it seems to be a lot more stable. So far I haven‘t had any issues, but time will tell. Bluetooth drops are still pretty common in most of my devices now and then.The biggest issue I have is with the mouse design though. And it has been a long time issue for decades now with these combo devices. It‘s why I tend to not buy Logitech‘s combos. The 3 button mouse... Seriously? Still? For over 20 years the 5 button navigation mouse has been the standard and most companies have adopted this, but Logitech has not on their base combos. There is next to no added expense and it shouldn‘t be only available in their high priced/overly priced combo models. Other manufacturers that produce similar quality mice offer 5 button ones for short money.Overall, I would give this combo a hard pass just because of the 1990‘s Bluetooth style 3 button mouse. You are better off paying the same money or less getting a brand that offers one with the back and forward navigation buttons.

reviews.标题: Decent lil keyboard and mouse combo
reviews.评论: Its little. Pairs easy with PC and my Mac except u have to push pair buttons evertime i switch. Besides that it does what its supposed to do

reviews.标题: Does not have a Print Screen Button
reviews.评论: Keyboard is not bad, but it does not have a PRINT SCREEN BUTTON!!This keyboard is useless to me without it. And it is not as easy as remapping a key since I use it along with a laptop and need to be able to use both keyboards (when this keyboard is not with me)HATE IT!!

Straight to two stars: Logitech follows the trend of companies that want to impose their will on your property. When you install this mouse, every time you start Windows there will be a pop up requesting you to upgrade to their drivers “for a better experience“. Every time. There will be a way to dismiss it, but if you reboot, you will be asked again and again and again.  I got this as a gift, so there was no way to return it, but I would not every buy a Logitech product again. How does it work: well, but I had no-brand mouse I bought from Amazon that worked almost as well. The one thing that this has going for it is that you can control three computers for mouse input, but instead of making this switch seamless by using one of the easily accessible buttons, it is under the mouse.  Good mouse, but if we keep supporting companies that hijack your personal space, it will be our own fault when we have no more privacy.

Bought a lot of Logitech products over the years. Got this in January 2023, now it‘s January 2026 and it broke about two months ago. Half the clicks I make don‘t register anymore and I can‘t figure out how to fix it. I‘ve never had this happen with a mouse before. I have a $10 Walmart mouse that‘s been working for like ten years. For the price, I‘d expect it to last.

After a certain period of use the scroll mouse starts to bug out. Every time you use the scroll to move up or down, the mouse always starts to jerk up even though the scroll mouse stopped moving completely. It becomes really annoying over time. I recommend you go with a different brand

reviews.标题: Not a full size keyboard, funky mouse
reviews.评论: Not a full size keyboard, funky mouse.  Not for me.

Whisper quiet and super productive. “This mouse is fantastic for the office. The clicks are virtually silent—no more annoying clicking noises during calls or in a quiet room. The ‘SmartWheel‘ is great too; it scrolls fast when you flick it but gives you precision when you go slow. Connecting via Bluetooth was instant, and being able to switch between my laptop and tablet with the button on the bottom is a great feature.“

left click starts malfunctioning after just 9 months of use. Bought logitech for the longevity and it didnt even last 1 year. The support button on their official website WAS NOT CLICKABLE. Check reddit, other people are having issues with the left clicking malfunctioning nearing the 1 year mark

The ergonomics are fine, however the durability leaves much to be desired. I’ve had this mouse for 2 years and have had problems with the left button for several months.In addition the back/forward buttons randomly get stuck which renders the mouse completely unusable.

For the price of this mouse, you would think it would last longer than 2 years. The left clicker button fails often and slows down productivity taking multiple clicks to select something on my computer. $70 for a sub par mouse should be a crime. What a waste of money

reviews.标题: Perfect if not for Middle Mouse Button
reviews.评论: Feels great to use. I love how quiet the mouse buttons are. I can‘t use a regular shaped mouse now. It feels wierd. The only thing I wish is that the middle mouse button was easier to press in. You really have to push it and there‘s lacking a tactile feedback that you‘ve even succeeded. Kind of a big deal if you play games that utilize MMB. Also when you scroll the wheel, it makes a little noise that I can see autistic or audiophiles honing in on.

reviews.标题: Love it till it stops working (1-2 year lifespan)
reviews.评论: Love it till it stops working. I‘ve bought two so far. The first one lasted me 2 years. The second one is just now showing signs of the same problem, and it‘s been 1 year and 3 months. Essentially, the mouse will click (feel a click and hear a click), but nothing will happen. I can compensate by pressing harder. As a result, I click multiple times and nothing happens, then I remember I need to press harder. This mouse is too expensive to only get two years out of it!
I had this mouse for over 2 years, and I can say as a student; this has caused more problems than not and is painfully uncomfortable.
there is no way to use the extra mouse buttons with push to talk in discord. trust me, I tried everything.

reviews.标题: Wrong kind for games I wasn‘t planning to play games
reviews.评论: I refunded

Bought this in 2024, functionality it was great in the beginning. Really helped with my carpel tunnel symptoms and battery life was great, but unfortunately for the PRICE you’re paying it should last longer than a year. I’ve had to purchase a new ergonomic mouse because this one stopped working in 2025. The click function to grab files and click around has stopped working, even after changing out to new batteries (so I know it’s not the battery). I even tried to adjust the sensitivity settings thinking that might be the issue, but nothing is working. It’s kind of disappointing for the price point that it only lasts a year and unless you buy a warranty you’re out of luck.
Spotty Bluetooth even with receiver it lags and stops for a few seconds all day very frustrating

reviews.标题: Would be great if it didn‘t lag
reviews.评论: Feels comfortable in the hand and generally great to use, but recently the button clicks lag. I often have to click the mouse bottoms 3 to four times in order to initiate an action. I am using Bluetooth because I am connecting to two different computers, which is the reason I bought the mouse in the first place.
The left mouse button double click issue is real.  Brand new and missing clicks sporadically on day one

reviews.标题: Terrible button placement + lasted only 2.5 years
reviews.评论: I‘ve always hated this mouse for the toggle button being on the bottom. This is terrible. It makes it impossible to do a quick computer swap, and of course they went out of their way to exclude this function from the app. It can‘t be assigned to a hotkey. This makes me hate Logitech. On top of that, the mouse is now spazzing out at 2.5 years of life. Drag is now impossible, which extremely debilitating. It seems to be adding extra clicks. So if you‘re like me and you‘re forced to buy this product due to lack of comparable options, get the 4 year protection plan.Update: the behavior has lessened, but I‘m still having issues with the mouse. 2.5 is not the worst lifespan, but I‘m leaving it at three stars due to the button placement and lack of assignable toggle.

reviews.标题: This came im used and i bought it as new (i‘m dissapointed)
reviews.评论: The mouse came with some scratches and with the battery placed in as the keyboard too

When I first started using this mouse, I was in love with it. It fixed all my wrist issues and had extremely long battery life. I use it almost exclusively for gaming. A year later however.... the left mouse button eats inputs and almost doesn‘t work. I called and they sent me a replacement and now the replacement also has the same problem but only after 3 months of use. I do not suggest this mouse even though it has fixed all my wrist problems.

Keyboard works fine but the keys relating to the speakers are not working. It might be a Windows 11 issue. I could not locate any Logitech driver updates online and the most recent Windows 11 updates did not resolve the issue.

I wound recommend this keyboard. the price is nice. But it stop working only two months after buying it. Thats probably why is so cheap comparwe to others. I had a razer kayboard for almost 2 years. First time getting a logitech and was not happy. issues connecting since the begining and then after 2 months it just stop working.

Keyboard arrived missing one of the cushion things on the bottom so it is very wonky and loud to type. It doesn‘t sit correctly, think like a table at a restaurant that rocks back and forth because the legs are different lengths...

reviews.标题: You almost get what you pay for.
reviews.评论: Worked great at first (a couple of months), then it became impossible to type.  Would either not respond at all or it would continuously repeat a letter.  Either way, it was worthless.  I have read similar reviews since buying it.  Should have done more research. For the record this was typed on a 5 year old Logitech K350.  Still going strong.
The keyboard is really nice, but I can‘t stand the mouse. It‘s just too light.
The mouse stopped working less than a year after I got it. Do not recommend for long term use.

reviews.标题: Poor functionality. Small mouse. Bad materials.
reviews.评论: The keyboard frequently loses connectivity and lags a lot of the key presses. Can type out a whole sentence and it will bug out and maybe push half of what I type or nothing at all. Additionally the cheap plastic materials don‘t last under much strain, the 7-degree tilt legs broke off very quickly.Mouse is also very small.
The mouse broke within one month of use. The keyboard is working fine. Does not recommend it please don’t buy here.

I remember when Logitech was the gold standard. . previous keyboard lasted me 15 years. This one is cheap junk and has connectivity issues. if it is farther than 2 feet from the usb receiver it has an input lag. I have my receiver plugged behind my monitor and it only works intermittently.  pointless
There was dongle missing. How am I supposed to use this. Send the new part
the worst keyboard you can buy!!!! DO NOT BUY THISdoes not connect to PC on Different APPSPiece of JUNK
Keyboard stops working intermittently 2 week after the warranty expired.

reviews.标题: Poor condition and missing USB receiver.
reviews.评论: Useless and in poor condition, missing USB receiver.
This keyboard and mouse worked once just one time.  I’m 5 days out of return window and now I’m stuck with this.  Rest assured I did a lot of troublshooting before I had to go by a new one.
This is a piece of crap. Bought it in May, 2025. Stopped working in Mid Sept, 2025. Would NOT recommend.
It has a wireless range of approximately 2 feet and regularly disconnects, with both mouse and keyboard not responding.
Product did not work. Not functioning at all.

reviews.标题: Can‘t Swap the Fn Key Functions
reviews.评论: The problem I have with this keyboard is you can‘t swap the Fn keys to control media. You always have to hold the Fn key to, for example, turn the volume up or down.
A week into using this and already, some of the keys aren’t working or have a delayed response while other keys work fine.  Can’t return without packaging. Waste of money.

This keyboard is not supported by any current Logitech software (Options+). It is only customizable using older software that is very limited and no longer supported by Logitech. If you need to customize your keys (as I do) this is not the keyboard you want!

reviews.标题: Outperformed by a $6 no name mouse
reviews.评论:
This mouse has been nothing but frustrating to own and use. It frequently disconnects from the computer - some days, it would work just fine with no issues. Other days, I had to uninstall the software and reinstall everything to get it to work.
I‘ve read the reddit threads, tried several other ’solutions’ and nothing works long-term.

Every once in a while, I’ll get curious and try something else to fix the issue with zero success.

I’m currently using a wireless mouse that I bought from Amazon for $6 - it has yet to fail. It’s light, inexpensively made, I’ve dropped it several times and there are chunks of the mouse missing but it has never failed.

The MX has never left my desk and fails more than it works. Shame because it’s a nice design and fits my hand perfectly.
Left click slowly stopped working over time. Its not impossible to edit with. I expected a longer lifespan from a premium product.

reviews.标题: Avoid it -- go for the G502 Lightspeed instead; for 2/3rd the price.
reviews.评论: First the short version: If you can avoid buying the MX Master 3S, please do. There are better options out there, including Logitech‘s G502 Lightspeed.Long Version: I own a bunch of Logitech products, including keyboards and other peripherals that are years old -- as in 15 to 20 years old. So, it is almost impossible to give a Logitech product a bad review. BUT the MX Master 3S is different -- it makes it very easy to hate the product so much that I actually decided to write my experience.The good: The mouse, when it works, is a pleasure to work with. It is definitely heavier than most mice, and that weight allows for a more controlled scroll. The size is large enough to fit in your hands.The bad: (The reason why I am here!) Barely a year and half (bought Apr 2024) and the left click does not work, or, one has to press the left button very hard. I thought mine was a bad piece, but it turns out that there are many users who have the exact same complaint. The left click does not work correctly. This is a disappointing piece of hardware, I must say. So, I am now using my, almost 3 year old, G502 lightspeed.

Wow! For this price what a piece of crap. I‘ve had it for over a year and the left button is failing. Sometimes i‘ll have to click multiple times for it to click. Long click to drag doesn‘t work either. Before it failed it was generally good. Smooth, easy to program with lots of options etc. As advertised and everything you‘d expect in a mouse at this price point. The software is a bit clunky, there‘s some bloat it‘s wild that it takes so much cpu and why AI in a mouse haha.But for it to crap out for no apparent reason is unacceptable. I‘ll program a different button in place of the left button for now but once i‘m done with this rodent i‘ll never spend money on Logitech again.

reviews.标题: Flawed device compared to previous generations.
reviews.评论: I bought this about two years ago and it‘s already broken. Left click works about half the time. It‘s incredibly frustratingt as I have had a Logitech MX Master (first gen) since 2017 that has worked flawlessly and has only required a battery swap.I am generally a big fan of Logitech products, but stay away from this mouse. The quality has clearly gone downhill.

Great hardware, poor serviceThe keyboard itself is well built and types beautifully, but the Easy-Switch feature isn’t reliable. It often gets stuck blinking on the third source and won’t change devices unless I reset or re-pair it.What’s more of a downer is Logitech’s support — I reached out for help days ago and never got a proper response. For a premium product, that level of service is really disappointing.

reviews.标题: An awesome mice, when it works.
reviews.评论: Great mouse, the hardware is solid. That being said, the software is a regular point of gripe. Every other week the software decides to zonk out after an update. It either stays stuck updating, which locks you out of created profiles, or it just flat out delets a profile. At first I thought it was a one off but after several months of regular workflow disruptions I have to just hang the towel. It works great when it does, but when it doesn‘t it‘ll be at least a half hour of troubleshooting or recreating your macros.

Like so many other people‘s reviews, my ‘left click‘ started failing about 6 months after the warranty expired.  For the longest time, I thought I had problems with applications, clicking on the “Leave Meeting“ or “Save File“ button and nothing would happen.  Turns out....not the App....it‘s the mouse.  So, if it were a $50 mouse, I‘d say Oh well, nothing lasts forever.  But it‘s a $120 mouse!  Three times with other similar products cost.  You‘d THINK it‘d last for more than 18 months.What‘s worse?  I spend nearly 2 hours on the Chat with some guy in India, deleting drivers, reinstalling drivers, testing drivers, putting drivers on another machine, testing on the other machine, spraying it with compressed air, and wasting time because it‘s not the software, it‘s the hardware, and it‘s junk.  Only thing we didn‘t is say a prayer over it.This is expensive hardware.  I spent nearly $225 bucks on this combo.  Lost the J key from the keyboard a week before THAT warranty experied, and after doing some back and forth, they replaced it.  But the mouse?  NADA....“sorry, can‘t help you!“  He had the audacity to suggest I buy another one!  LOLSo, I give the keyboard a B- and the mouse an F.  Don‘t buy either of them.

Bought this mouse as recommended by multiple reviewers. Out of the box the cursor jumps around. It is very annoying. Support has not been able to correct the issue. I have gone back to my old mouse & will be trying another brand. Logitech just lost my business.
I ordered a new mouse. I received an obviously used mouse. The buttons and cushions are clearly worn.

Nice keyboard from a mechanical perspective - my favorite actually. Not a fan of the intrusive software though. And now, 2 months after purchase, the backlighting has stopped working and apparently I can‘t return it.

reviews.标题: Sadly disappointed with the New Logitech
reviews.评论: I had very high hopes for this combo as a very happy customer since they started. to upgrade from my current all-Logitech set-up, I have come to need backlighting for working at night. Their Installs have always been seamless, but this took 3 days and I wasn‘t able to get it‘s basics-backlighting-working and it disabled my Logitech webcam.  It may be they aren‘t finished making their on-line tutorials match the product, and their AI support did not make the  transition from marketing to addressing the support I was asking for and just stopped. I regret having reporting this of a company that made such wonderful products I‘ve known and loved for may years

reviews.标题: Lasted 13 months, 5 days before right click died
reviews.评论: Ergonomics are great, but I only use left and right buttons and the top wheel.  Battery life is not great.Mouse was used in a clean, office environment.  I expect devices to last longer, particularly ones that are relatively expensive.

Extremely disappointed in this mouse. After just 2 years it has acquired a glitch (that appears to be somewhat common across other users‘ experience) that frequently interrupts “dragging and dropping“ actions and has since propagated to NOT EVEN CLICKING PROPERLY. This happened within weeks for both of my MX Master 3S Units. For the price I expected a much more durable, longer lasting product.Even having finished the above review, it failed to click the “submit“ button twice.

Bought this twice from Amazon, both times listed in Used - Very Good condition. First one showed up with a scroll wheel that was permanently locked up. Sent it in for exchange - second unit‘s clicking switches are totally unreliable and I usually either don‘t get a click out of it at all or I get double-clicks when I only sent one. Waited too long to do anything about it so I‘m out of the money I spent on it. Sucks because if I didn‘t get two broken units I‘d actually really like this mouse. Instead I bought a Keychron M5 as a replacement - can‘t wait for a working mouse to get here.

The MX Master 3s mouse is comfortable and seems to have good build quality, but compared to three other mice I tested (both wired and wireless), it has the worst latency by far. The amount of jitter could give someone a seizure.

It lasted 2 years. Like other reviewers, the mouse stopped working around the 2-year mark. The left mouse click stopped working consistently during click-and-drag operations, unpredictably releasing and clicking while the button was held down. Absolutely unacceptable to only last 2 years at this price point.

I had this for about 2 months before it just stopped charging. Like the charger would be plugged into it, but it wouldn’t charge. I did some research, and this make and model is actually known for having that happen, and it’s practically unfixable. I will stay away from Logitech products from now on. The first time I spent good money on a good mouse and it barely lasts, and then my cheap mouse is going on its 10th year.
Stopped working all of a sudden, wouldn‘t turn in or charge.

A shame because this mouse cross off everything on the list for an outstanding productivity mouse. Comfortable , light, scroll wheel is great, battery is a power house.Just doesn’t last long. I had for about two years then my buttons stopped working
